recommendations.title: Savior
recommendations.overview: A hardened mercenary in the Foreign Legion begins to find his own humanity when confronted with atrocities during the fighting in Bosnia.

recommendations.title: Section 8
recommendations.overview: After avenging the murder of his family, a former soldier is sprung from prison and recruited by a shadowy government agency.

recommendations.title: Wolf Warrior 2
recommendations.overview: China's deadliest special forces operative settles into a quiet life on the sea. When sadistic mercenaries begin targeting nearby civilians, he must leave his newfound peace behind and return to his duties as a soldier and protector.

recommendations.title: Platoon
recommendations.overview: As a young and naive recruit in Vietnam, Chris Taylor faces a moral crisis when confronted with the horrors of war and the duality of man.

recommendations.title: Close Range
recommendations.overview: A rogue soldier turned outlaw is thrust into a relentless fight with a corrupt sheriff, his obedient deputies, and a dangerous drug cartel in order to protect his sister and her young daughter.

recommendations.title: Kiss of the Dragon
recommendations.overview: Liu Jian, an elite Chinese police officer, comes to Paris to arrest a Chinese drug lord. When Jian is betrayed by a French officer and framed for murder, he must go into hiding and find new allies.
A young British soldier must find his way back to safety after his unit accidentally abandons him during a riot in the streets of Belfast.

recommendations.title: Rambo
recommendations.overview: In Thailand, ex-Green Beret John James Rambo joins a group of mercenaries to venture into war-torn neighboring Myanmar to rescue a group of Christian aid workers who have been kidnapped by a ruthless local infantry unit.

recommendations.title: Pretty Village, Pretty Flame
recommendations.overview: In the opening stages of the Bosnian War, a small group of Serbian soldiers are trapped in a tunnel by a Muslim force.

recommendations.title: The Desert Fox: The Story of Rommel
recommendations.overview: The life and career of Erwin Rommel and his involvement in the plot to assassinate Hitler.
